mission.title: opentelemetry-collector: Support default values for configuration environment variables
mission.description: Support default values for configuration environment variables. Requested by 8+ users.

steps.title: Check current opentelemetry-collector deployment
steps.description:
Verify your opentelemetry-collector version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n opentelemetry-collector -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry-collector
helm list -n opentelemetry-collector 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working opentelemetry-collector installation.

steps.title: Review opentelemetry-collector configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant opentelemetry-collector configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n opentelemetry-collector -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry-collector
kubectl get configmap -n opentelemetry-collector -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=opentelemetry-collector
```
When using [Configuration Environment Variables](https://opentelemetry.io/docs/collector/configuration/#configuration-environment-variables), 

**if a variable is NOT SET on otelcol start, the value will be empty and probably break

steps.title: Apply the fix for Support default values for configuration environment…
steps.description:
I don't get the same error as you do. With this configuration file:

<details>
<summary>Config file (click to expand)</summary>

```yaml
receivers:
  nop:

exporters:
  nop:

processors:
  memory_limiter:
    check_interval: 2s
    limit_mib: ${OTEL_MEMORY_LIMIT_MIB}

service:
  pipelines:
   
```yaml
processors:
  attributes/example:
    actions:
      - key: "${DB_KEY:CustomerDefaultKey}"
        action: "${OPERATION:CustomerDefaultOperation}"
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n opentelemetry-collector -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry-collector
kubectl get events -n opentelemetry-collector --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Support default values for configuration environment…" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
I don't get the same error as you do. With this configuration file:

<details>
<summary>Config file (click to expand)</summary>

```yaml
receivers:
  nop:

exporters:
  nop:

processors:
  memory_limiter:
    check_interval: 2s
    limit_mib: ${OTEL_MEMORY_LIMIT_MIB}

service:
  pipelines:
    metrics:
        receivers: [nop]
        exporters: [nop]
        processors:

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with opentelemetry-collector installed or the issue environment reproducible.
